mapper.sql: SELECT score_id, branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time FROM jw_branch_score
mapper.select: WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} AND data_year = #{dataYear} ORDER BY score_category
WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear} ORDER BY score_category, rank_num
WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear} AND score_category = #{category} ORDER BY rank_num
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES ( #{branchId}, #{dataYear}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{categoryScore}, #{rankNum}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_branch_score WHERE score_id IN
#{id}
DELETE FROM jw_branch_score WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.branchId}, #{item.dataYear}, #{item.city}, #{item.scoreCategory}, #{item.positiveDistance}, #{item.negativeDistance}, #{item.categoryScore}, #{item.rankNum}, sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES ( #{branchId}, #{dataYear}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{categoryScore}, #{rankNum}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE positive_distance = VALUES(positive_distance), negative_distance = VALUES(negative_distance), category_score = VALUES(category_score), rank_num = VALUES(rank_num)

INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES ( #{branchId}, #{dataYear}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{categoryScore}, #{rankNum}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE positive_distance = VALUES(positive_distance), negative_distance = VALUES(negative_distance), category_score = VALUES(category_score), rank_num = VALUES(rank_num)
